queries.question: Empirical analysis of loan duration in months as a significant credit risk driver that increases the probability of default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into the absence of a checking account as a key determinant of default and a credit risk driver that elevates overall risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of minimal savings account balances as a mitigating factor among the determinants of default that reduces credit risk likelihood.
